no: Imoen 4 Ever - SoD components I4E SoD components always early but after Jastey's SoD mods

conflicts.reason: Immersion conflict between the two Imoen mods

Complementary. JTweaks cn:370 applies small bug fixes to Imoen scripts (XP sync, spell states). Imoen Forever adds major new content throughout SoD. Both use EXTEND on Imoen scripts — JT fixes go on top of I4E content. Install JTweaks after Imoen Forever.

sum: Keeps Imoen as an active party member throughout SoD and into BG2, with new dialogue. Prevents the story from forcibly removing her.

rec.tip: Keeps Imoen available through SoD and early SoA. Great for story continuity in EET.

co.n: Imoen 4 Ever in BGII: Imoen Returns after Talking to Gaelan in Chapter 2
co.no: Imoen returns after talking to Gaelan in BG2 Chapter 2.
co.tp2n: Imoen 4 Ever in BGII: Imoen Returns after Talking to Gaelan in Chapter 2

co.n: Imoen 4 Ever in BGII: Give Imoen Dialogue Content in SoA
co.no: Gives Imoen new dialogue content throughout SoA.
co.tp2n: Imoen 4 Ever in BGII: Give Imoen Dialogue Content in SoA

co.n: Imoen 4 Ever in BGII: Yoshimo Comes to Brynnlaw
co.tp2n: Imoen 4 Ever in BGII: Yoshimo Comes to Brynnlaw
co.no: Makes Yoshimo appear at Brynnlaw only if Imoen is in party. Requires BG2-era game (bg2ee/eet/bgt/tob) and Imoen 4 Ever main component.

co.n: Imoen 4 Ever in BGII: Give Imoen Protection Spell in Chapters 2 & 3
co.no: Imoen gets a protection spell during Chapters 2 and 3.
co.tp2n: Imoen 4 Ever in BGII: Give Imoen Protection Spell in Chapters 2 & 3

co.n: Imoen 4 Ever in BGII: Compatibility with Alternatives and Saerileth
co.no: Requires Alternatives mod installed. Crossmod compatibility component — skip if not using Alternatives
co.tp2n: Imoen 4 Ever in BGII: Compatibility with Alternatives and Saerileth

co.n: Imoen 4 Ever in SoD: Imoen Remains in Group in Korlasz' Dungeon
co.no: Incompatible with EndlessBG1 Korlasz Dungeon in BG1. Exclude when using EndlessBG1.
co.tp2n: Imoen 4 Ever in SoD: Imoen Remains in Group in Korlasz' Dungeon

co.no: Imoen gives a better reason for staying behind in SoD palace attack.
co.tp2n: Imoen 4 Ever in SoD: Imoen Gives Better Reason to Stay Behind in Palace

co.n: Imoen 4 Ever in SoD: Give Imoen Dialogue Content in Chapters 8-12
co.no: Imoen has new dialogue throughout SoD chapters 8-12. REQUIRES BG:EE with SoD DLC installed (BDIMOENB.DLG + BDBANTER.2DA must be in chitin.key). Will skip with 'BDIMOENB.DLG not in chitin.key' error if SoD files are missing from the base game install.
co.tp2n: Imoen 4 Ever in SoD: Give Imoen Dialogue Content in Chapters 8-12

co.n: Imoen at the End of the Game Should be the One that Was in Party (SoD Only)
co.no: SoD only component. Not needed for EET installs.
co.tp2n: Imoen at the End of the Game Should be the One that Was in Party (SoD Only)
